subject: feat(icon): hexagon with dot grid network pattern
body:
Geometric hexagon outline with 3x3 dot grid and connecting lines inside.
Tech/network feel that references the project portfolio. Built from basic
SVG shapes (polygon, circles, lines) — no font dependencies, renders
crisply from 48px favicon to 512px.

Tags: icon, branding, ui
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: header-styling
Semver: patch

title: hexagon with dot grid network pattern
